self_conditional_modifiers_json.description: Tireless Hunt (R1): after hitting an opponent with a Charged Attack, Charged Attack DMG is increased by an amount equal to 160% of Elemental Mastery, for up to 12 Charged Attacks or 10s (1 instance every 12s). Approximated as a flat +320 Charged Attack DMG, assuming ~200 Elemental Mastery (no eval-time EM-to-flat-dmg conversion key exists).
